lightsail.container.publicendpoint.CfnAb: `PublicEndpoint` is a property of the [ContainerServiceDeployment](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-lightsail-container-containerservicedeployment.html) property. It describes describes the settings of the public endpoint of a container on a container service.

lightsail.container.publicendpoint.Conta.Description: The name of the container entry of the deployment that the endpoint configuration applies to.
The port of the specified container to which traffic is forwarded to.

lightsail.container.publicendpoint.Healt.Description: An object that describes the health check configuration of the container.
